name: ell
description: ell is a language model programming library that treats prompts as programs. Features automatic versioning, serialization, and rich tooling for prompt engineering with Ell Studio for visualization.

description: A model server agnostic inference benchmarking tool that can be used to benchmark LLMs running on differet infrastructure like GPU and TPU. It can also be run on a GKE cluster as a container.

description: Resource scheduling and cluster management for AI.

name: axolotl
description: A tool designed to streamline the fine-tuning of various AI models, offering support for multiple configurations and architectures.

name: Agentic Radar
description: Agentic Radar is a security scanner for LLM agentic workflows for potential vulnerabilities.

name: LlamaIndex
